CLAUSE.NAME: StandardWording-1
CLAUSE.value: We, NATIONAL BANK OF OMAN (S.A.O.G), CBD BRANCH, P.O. BOX 752, RUWI, POSTALCODE 112, Sultanate of Oman hereby provide our conclusive irrevocable payment guarantee for [[[GTEE_CCY]]].[[[GTEE_AMT]]] inclusive of accrued interest and all other charges, as security for an overdraft which you are making available to M/s. - . We hereby irrevocably without objection undertake to pay to you on your first written demand irrespective of the legal effects of the above mentioned overdraft facility relationship and waiving all rights of objection and defensearising from said overdraft facility relationship, any amount not exceeding [[[GTEE_CCY]]].[[[GTEE_AMT]]] being the outstanding under the overdraft facility inclusive of interest and all other charges payable as on the date of the claim, upon receipt of your request for payment and your confirmation in writing by authenticated telex/swift that M/s. has not repaid the amount claimed under this guarantee on the due date.
